visuals.title: One-Time Pad Encryption Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">One-Time Pad and Steganography</text>
  
  <!-- Plaintext Message -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Plaintext
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- One-Time Pad Key -->
  <rect x="270" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    One-Time Pad
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- XOR Operation -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="90" r="25" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="white" opacity="0">
    XOR
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Plaintext to XOR -->
  <path d="M150 90 L185 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Key to XOR -->
  <path d="M270 90 L235 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Ciphertext -->
  <rect x="160" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Ciphertext
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from XOR to Ciphertext -->
  <path d="M210 115 L210 145" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Steganography Container -->
  <rect x="160" y="220" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Steganography
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Ciphertext to Steganography -->
  <path d="M210 190 L210 215" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Hidden Message Indicator -->
  <rect x="180" y="240" width="60" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="253" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Hidden
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
